notes: Solid, complete Pong implementation with proper serve/play/gameover states, angle-based paddle deflection, speed scaling, AI logic, and audio; minor issue is the AI only tracks ball when moving right (ball.vx>0) which makes it slightly exploitable, and the net/score layout is functional but minimal.
An excellent, fully-featured Pong clone with great scaling, audio, and AI, though the player paddle has a slight risk of ball tunneling at maximum speed.
A solid and mostly complete Pong build with good presentation, but minor collision/input quirks and simplistic AI keep it well short of perfect.
